## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what this PR does. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix — behavior was wrong, now it's right
- [ ] Feature — new user-visible capability
- [ ] Refactor — internal only, behavior unchanged
- [ ] Docs — mdBook / README / comments only
- [ ] Tests — coverage only
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Chore — deps bump, license, etc.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `mdbook build docs` passes
- [ ] **Docs updated** — relevant page under `docs/src/` reflects the
  change (or this PR is tagged `[no-docs]` because the change is
  genuinely internal; see `docs/src/contributing.md`)
- [ ] Breaking change? If yes, called out in the summary
